summary: Tested new referral program, flash bonus promotions, partner deposit commissions, and notifications features. All backend APIs working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend wallet tabs (Einladen/Referral and Bonus) working correctly. Partner Portal Provisionen tab working correctly.

issues: FlashBonusPromo component not visible on homepage - may be due to hot-reload caching or component returning null

referral_api_my_code.details: Returns user's referral code (REF-XXXXXX format), reward amount, uses count, total earned

referral_api_my_referrals.details: Returns list of referred users, total earned, uses count

referral_api_use.details: Correctly rejects invalid codes (404) and unauthenticated requests (401/403)

active_promotions_api.details: Returns flash promotions with bonus_percentage, valid_until, min_deposit, hours/minutes remaining. Supports language parameter (de, en, tr)

notifications_api.details: Returns user notifications with unread_count. Supports limit parameter. Correctly rejects unauthenticated requests

partner_stats_api.details: Endpoint exists and requires partner token

wallet_einladen_tab.details: Einladen (Referral) tab visible in BidBlitzPay wallet. Shows referral code (REF-286446), copy/share buttons, stats (€0.00 earned, 0 friends), 'So funktioniert's' section with 3 steps

wallet_bonus_tab.details: Bonus tab visible in BidBlitzPay wallet. Shows 4 deposit offers (5%, 10%, 15%, 20% bonus) with interest rates (2-5% p.a.), lock periods (30-180 days), partner commission rates

partner_portal_provisionen_tab.details: Provisionen (Commissions) tab visible in Partner Portal. Shows 'Einzahlungs-Provisionen' header, stats cards (Gesamte Provision, Vermittelte Einzahlungen, Kunden, Ø Provision), 'So funktioniert's' section explaining 2-5% commission

flash_bonus_promo_homepage.details: FlashBonusPromo component exists and is imported in Home.js but not rendering on homepage. Component returns null if loading/no promo/expired. API returns valid promo data.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate why FlashBonusPromo component is not visible on homepage (may be state/caching issue)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Einladen tab, Bonus tab, Partner Provisionen tab all working. FlashBonusPromo not visible on homepage)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully working: /api/referral/my-code returns REF-XXXXXX codes, /api/referral/active-promotions returns flash promos with countdown. Partner Portal has Provisionen tab showing deposit commissions dashboard. Wallet has Einladen and Bonus tabs working. FlashBonusPromo component exists but not rendering on homepage - may need investigation.
